title: Prefabworldmod
description:
Added a new folder to minecraft's instance folder, when a user places a map in this folder, every world you create will be archived based on it.
This module is intended for use by mapmakers and module pack authors.
body:
After loading this module, a new 
```
prefab_saves
```
 folder will be created in your instance folder, you just need to place the world folder that you want to set up as a prefab map in it , when you create a new world, it will be created based on this map!


Example Folder

![Example Folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cb2a43dec31be24280c6f763a692aa667da4d7b.png)


prefab_saves

![prefab_saves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b7606b1957cf4cf9e0c3de50550e8d7cf9e14cb.png)
